Dreamcore is an internet aesthetic that recreates the feeling of being in a dream, especially the kind that is nostalgic, confusing, or slightly unsettling. It often features familiar places like empty hallways or playgrounds, but presented in a distorted or eerie way, along with blurry visuals and random, cryptic text. Instead of making logical sense, dreamcore focuses on emotion and atmosphere, making things feel both real and unreal at the same time—like a memory you can’t fully understand bu
